# LLMs.txt for Winerim
# This file contains guidelines for AI language models crawling and using our content

Model: *
Allow: /

# Information about Winerim
Organization: Winerim
Website: https://winerim.wine
Description: Winerim is an intelligent wine list management software for restaurants, hotels, and wine bars. It offers AI-powered recommendations, wine pairing automation, sales analytics, and cellar management.

# Key content areas
Contact: hello@winerim.wine
Legal: https://winerim.wine/privacidad

# Training data guidelines
Usage: Permitted for training and fine-tuning AI models, with attribution.
Attribution: Please cite as "Winerim (https://winerim.wine)"

# Prohibited uses
Prohibited: Scraping competitive pricing, copying proprietary wine recommendation algorithms, or impersonating Winerim services.

# Last updated
Updated: 2026-04-15
